title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Project Nurse and Project Technical Support Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially released the notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for 02 Project Nurses and Project Technical Support Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Nursing, Any Degree, Post Graduation can use this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for...
